zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfrey Hilton II於1419年11月9日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親Godfrey Hilton29歲，母親Hawise Lutterel27歲。他於1453年與Marjory de Willoughby在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年5月18日在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆易爾納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

variants.name: Hulton
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilt
meanings: German: from a short form of Hildebrand or some other compound ancient Germanic name formed with hild ‘strife, battle’ as the first element. See Hild .
English (London): from the Middle English personal name Hilte, ultimately from ancient Germanic Helto, probably from halith- ‘hero’.

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

en.lifeSummary: When Godfrey Hilton II was born on 9 November 1419, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Godfrey Hilton, was 29 and his mother, Hawise Lutterel, was 27. He married Marjory de Willoughby in 1453, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 18 May 1472, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Irnham, Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfrey Hilton II est né le 9 novembre 1419, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Godfrey Hilton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Hawise Lutterel, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Marjory de Willoughby en 1453, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1472, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Irnham, Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfrey Hilton II am 9. November 1419 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godfrey Hilton 29 und seine Mutter Hawise Lutterel 27. Er hat 1453 in Lincolnshire, England Marjory de Willoughby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Mai 1472 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Irnham, Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Marjory de Willoughby nel 1453, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 maggio 1472, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Irnham, Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Godfrey Hilton IIが1419年11月9日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Godfrey Hiltonは29歳，母Hawise Lutterelは27歳であった。1453年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでMarjory de Willoughbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1472年5月18日に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムイルンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfrey Hilton II(이)가 1419년 11월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godfrey Hilton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Lutterel(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1453년 영국 링코실르에서 Marjory de Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 5월 18일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 언함 언함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godfrey Hilton II nasceu em 9 de novembro de 1419, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Godfrey Hilton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Lutterel, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjory de Willoughby em 1453, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfrey Hilton II родился 9 ноября 1419 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Godfrey Hilton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Lutterel, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjory de Willoughby в 1453 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 мая 1472 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности ирнам, ирнам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
